notes: Platform Admin app runs on port 5112, NOT the ERP web app (port 5110)
Platform Admin uses dark sidebar theme (slate-900), NOT Concept D purple
Two roles: PLATFORM_ADMIN (full access) and PLATFORM_VIEWER (read-only)
Backend is Platform API on port 5101 (proxied via /api/v1)
Journey j20 tests the ERP web app (port 5110) for the impersonation banner

journeys.name: Login with Platform Credentials and MFA
journeys.description: Test the platform authentication flow including email/password login, MFA challenge, and successful redirect to dashboard
journeys.preconditions: Platform API running on port 5101 with seeded PLATFORM_ADMIN user (MFA enabled)

steps.expected_result: Login page loads with email and password fields
steps.visual_check: Login page with 'PLATFORM ADMIN' branding, email input, password input, and Submit button visible

steps.expected_result: Form fields populated
Error message displayed for invalid credentials
steps.visual_check: Red error message visible below form: 'Invalid email or password'

steps.expected_result: Form fields updated with correct credentials
MFA code input field appears (202 response triggers MFA challenge)
steps.visual_check: MFA code input field visible with instruction text, original email/password fields may be hidden or disabled

steps.expected_result: MFA code entered
Authentication succeeds, redirect to dashboard
steps.visual_check: Dashboard page visible with dark sidebar, 'PLATFORM ADMIN' branding, and welcome content

journeys.name: Verify App Shell and All 9 Navigation Items
journeys.description: Verify the platform admin app shell has dark sidebar with all 9 navigation items and 'PLATFORM ADMIN' branding
journeys.preconditions: Authenticated as PLATFORM_ADMIN

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads with sidebar visible
steps.visual_check: Dark sidebar (slate-900 background) with 'PLATFORM ADMIN' branding text, purple accent on active Dashboard item, white text on dark background

steps.expected_result: All 9 nav items visible: Dashboard, Tenants, Plans, AI Usage, Billing, Support Console, Monitoring, Audit Log, Settings
Navigates to /tenants, Tenants nav item becomes active
Navigates to /plans
Navigates to /ai-usage
Navigates to /billing
Navigates to /support
Navigates to /monitoring
Navigates to /audit-log
Navigates to /settings
steps.visual_check: Settings page loaded, Settings nav item has purple active background with white text

steps.expected_result: Sidebar collapses to icon-only mode
steps.visual_check: Sidebar collapsed showing only icons, no text labels, 'PLATFORM ADMIN' branding replaced by icon or hidden

journeys.name: PLATFORM_VIEWER Sees Read-Only UI
journeys.description: Verify that PLATFORM_VIEWER users cannot see or interact with write actions throughout the app
journeys.preconditions: Authenticated as PLATFORM_VIEWER user

steps.expected_result: Dashboard loads with read-only indicator
steps.visual_check: Dashboard shows 'Read-only mode' indicator for PLATFORM_VIEWER user

steps.expected_result: Tenant list loads but '+ New Tenant' button is hidden
steps.visual_check: Tenant list table visible, no '+ New Tenant' button in the action area

steps.expected_result: Tenant detail page loads without action buttons
No Suspend, Reactivate, Archive, or Impersonate buttons visible
steps.visual_check: Tenant detail page with tabs visible but action bar has no lifecycle buttons — read-only view

steps.expected_result: Module toggles are disabled/read-only
steps.visual_check: Module override toggle switches are visible but greyed out/disabled, feature flag toggles also disabled

steps.expected_result: Plans page loads without '+ New Plan' button
steps.visual_check: Plan cards visible with plan details, no '+ New Plan' button, no edit icons on cards

steps.expected_result: Billing dashboard loads without 'Change Enforcement' buttons
steps.visual_check: Billing KPI cards and issues table visible, but 'Change Enforcement' action buttons hidden from rows

steps.expected_result: AI Usage page loads without Export CSV button
steps.visual_check: AI usage overview with KPI cards and chart visible, no 'Export CSV' button

steps.expected_result: Support console loads, search works, but Impersonate buttons hidden
steps.visual_check: Support console search bar visible, results (if any) show 'View' button but no 'Impersonate' button

steps.expected_result: Tenant list page loads with table
steps.visual_check: Page header 'Tenants' with '+ New Tenant' button, data table with columns: Name, Code, Plan, Status (colour badges), Billing Status, Last Activity, User Count

steps.expected_result: ACTIVE badge shows green colour (green-600)
SUSPENDED badge shows red colour (red-600)
Dropdown opens with TenantStatus enum values
Table filters to show only ACTIVE tenants

steps.expected_result: Table filters to show tenants matching search query
All filters cleared, full tenant list restored

steps.target: Pagination controls or Load More button
steps.expected_result: Pagination visible with total count from meta.total

steps.expected_result: Tenant list loads
Tenant detail page loads with breadcrumb and tabs

steps.expected_result: Overview tab shows: Display Name, Code, Legal Name, Status, Plan, Region, Billing Status, Created, Last Activity, Sandbox Mode
For ACTIVE tenant: 'Suspend' button visible, 'Impersonate' button visible

AI Usage tab content loads with usage data or placeholder

journeys.name: Suspend an Active Tenant
journeys.description: Test suspending an ACTIVE tenant with mandatory reason confirmation dialog
journeys.preconditions: Authenticated as PLATFORM_ADMIN, ACTIVE tenant exists

steps.expected_result: Tenant detail page loads for ACTIVE tenant
Confirmation dialog opens with 'Suspend Tenant' title
steps.visual_check: Modal dialog with title 'Suspend Tenant', description mentioning 30-second propagation (BR-PLT-002), reason textarea, and destructive 'Suspend Tenant' confirm button

steps.expected_result: Confirm button is disabled because reason is empty (requireReason: true)

input_data.reason: Security investigation — suspicious activity detected on tenant account

steps.expected_result: Reason entered, confirm button becomes enabled
Tenant suspended, success toast appears, status updates in-place
steps.visual_check: Success toast 'Tenant suspended' visible, tenant status badge changed from green ACTIVE to red SUSPENDED, action bar now shows 'Reactivate' button instead of 'Suspend'

journeys.name: Reactivate a Suspended Tenant

journeys.preconditions: Authenticated as PLATFORM_ADMIN, SUSPENDED tenant exists (e.g. after j6)

steps.expected_result: Tenant detail loads showing SUSPENDED status
steps.visual_check: Tenant detail with red SUSPENDED status badge, 'Reactivate' button visible, 'Archive' button in overflow menu

steps.expected_result: Confirmation dialog opens with 'Reactivate Tenant' title
steps.visual_check: Dialog with 'Reactivate Tenant' title, description about restoring full ERP access and entitlement cache refresh, 'Reactivate' confirm button (default variant, not destructive)

steps.expected_result: Tenant reactivated, success toast appears, status updates
steps.visual_check: Success toast 'Tenant reactivated' visible, status badge changed from red SUSPENDED to green ACTIVE, action bar shows 'Suspend' button again

steps.target: Create / Save button in plan dialog

journeys.name: Change Billing Enforcement Action
journeys.description: Test changing enforcement action on a tenant's billing tab with state machine validation and consequence descriptions
journeys.preconditions: Authenticated as PLATFORM_ADMIN, tenant with billing data exists

steps.expected_result: Tenant detail loads
Billing tab loads with enforcement timeline and billing details
steps.visual_check: Billing tab showing: subscription status, dunning level, grace period, enforcement escalation timeline (step indicator: NONE → WARNING → READ_ONLY → SUSPENDED) with current step highlighted, 'Change Enforcement' button, 'Change Plan' button

steps.expected_result: 4-step timeline with current enforcement level highlighted and connecting arrows
Confirmation dialog opens showing valid transitions only
steps.visual_check: Dialog with: current enforcement action displayed, dropdown showing only valid target actions per state machine (e.g. from NONE: only WARNING), reason textarea (required), optional grace period days input

steps.expected_result: Consequence description updates for WARNING
Text: 'A warning banner will appear in the tenant's ERP within 30 seconds.'

input_data.reason: Payment overdue by 14 days, escalating to warning

steps.expected_result: Reason entered, confirm button becomes enabled
Enforcement changed, success toast with previous → new action
steps.visual_check: Success toast showing transition (e.g. 'NONE → WARNING'), enforcement timeline updates to highlight WARNING step, billing details refresh

steps.expected_result: Reason entered
Plan changed, success toast

journeys.name: Start an Impersonation Session
journeys.description: Test starting an impersonation session with mandatory reason and configurable time limit
journeys.preconditions: Authenticated as PLATFORM_ADMIN, ACTIVE tenant exists

steps.expected_result: Tenant detail page loads
Impersonation dialog opens
steps.visual_check: Modal dialog with: reason textarea (required, min 10 chars), duration selector (15/30/60/120/240/480 minutes, default 60), warning text: 'You will be redirected to the tenant's ERP. All actions will be audited.'

steps.expected_result: Submit button is disabled because reason is empty

input_data.reason: Investigating reported UI rendering issue on dashboard for customer support ticket #4521

steps.expected_result: Reason entered (>10 chars), duration set to 30 minutes, submit button enabled
Impersonation session created, browser redirects to tenant ERP URL with impersonation token
steps.visual_check: Browser navigating to ERP app (port 5110) with impersonation_token query parameter

journeys.name: Impersonation Banner in ERP Web App
journeys.description: Test the non-dismissable amber impersonation banner in the tenant ERP, countdown timer, and End Session flow
journeys.preconditions: Active impersonation session from j19, ERP app running on port 5110

steps.expected_result: ERP app loads with impersonation banner at top
steps.visual_check: Fixed amber banner (bg-amber-500 text-black) at top of viewport with: 'IMPERSONATING: {tenantName} ({tenantCode})', admin email, 'Expires: MM:SS' countdown, 'End Session' button. Main content pushed down by banner height. Banner is NOT dismissable — no close/X button

steps.expected_result: Countdown timer showing remaining time in MM:SS format, updating every second
No close/dismiss/X button on the banner — it is permanent
Banner persists across navigation
steps.visual_check: Amber impersonation banner still visible at top after navigating to a different ERP page

steps.expected_result: Impersonation session ends, redirect to platform admin portal
steps.visual_check: Browser redirected back to platform admin portal (port 5112), no impersonation banner visible, platform admin app shell loads normally

journeys.name: Audit Log List with Filters

steps.expected_result: Audit Log page loads with filter bar and data table

Data table with columns: Timestamp (DD/MM/YYYY HH:mm:ss), Admin User, Action (badge-styled), Target Type, Target ID (truncated UUID), IP Address. 'Export CSV' button in action area. Table sorted newest first

steps.expected_result: Dropdown shows known actions: tenant.create, tenant.suspend, tenant.reactivate, billing.enforcement_changed, platform.impersonation_started, etc.
Table filters to show only tenant.suspend audit entries

steps.expected_result: Table filters to tenant-related actions only
Date range filter applied
Only records within date range shown

steps.expected_result: All filters reset, full audit log restored

steps.target: Load more button or infinite scroll trigger
steps.expected_result: Cursor-based pagination available for loading additional entries
Next page of audit log entries loads and appends to table

Full UUID displayed with a copy-to-clipboard button
